danger_signals.visual_form: onscreen obstacles and enemy fire in 3D field
hostile entities appearing during horizontal scroll
danger_signals.meaning: combat engagement required or avoidance necessary
major threat requiring sustained engagement; progression gate

danger_signals.visual_form: scrolling terrain and barriers in 3D field

safety_signals.visual_form: spaceship converts into giant robot form
safety_signals.meaning: power increase and state change; reduced vulnerability through enhanced mobility

safety_signals.visual_form: ship components fully assembled into robot
safety_signals.meaning: progression milestone; world state transition to mechanized combat mode

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: player-controlled construct occupies center screen during horizontal scroll

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: various enemy types attempting to stop ship construction

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: spaceship configuration with partial assembly; 3D field perspective during scroll
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: reduced mobility; avoidance-focused gameplay; ship must complete construction while dodging obstacles

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: fully assembled giant robot form replaces spaceship visually
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: increased mobility; gameplay shifts to typical horizontal scrolling shooter mechanics; offensive capability enhanced

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Babylon three-headed mechanical dragon dominates screen space
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: combat intensity escalates; player must sustain damage output against resilient enemy; progression requires victory

environmental_storytelling.example: spaceship assembly into giant robot signals technological/military escalation; visual transformation communicates power fantasy and narrative progression
Babylon's resemblance to Mecha-King Ghidorah establishes tone as sci-fi/mecha; signals player confronting massive mechanical threat
3D field during scroll establishes spatial depth; obstacle placement communicates level design difficulty and environmental hazards

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: cautious movement; prioritizes obstacle avoidance; limited offensive capability
increased speed and maneuverability; offensive-focused; sustained horizontal scroll engagement
attack patterns designed to interrupt ship construction; projectile fire and movement obstruction
sustained threat requiring prolonged engagement; three-headed design suggests multiple attack vectors and resilience

notes: MagMax communicates world-state primarily through mechanical transformation (spaceship → robot) as visual/behavioral inflection point. The two-phase gameplay structure (construction/evasion vs. robot/combat) is signaled through entity form change rather than environmental recoloring or faction symbols. Danger is conveyed through obstacle density and enemy presence in scrolling field. Safety emerges from successful transformation, indicating progression and power gain. Limited faction identity differentiation; conflict is player vs. generic hostile force rather than faction-vs-faction. Babylon boss design (Ghidorah homage) establishes boss-encounter danger through iconic mecha imagery.
